Sky UI Documentation Hub

Glass UI Library

Sky UI

A glassmorphism component library for Angular and React, built for dashboards, control surfaces, navigation shells, and telemetry-heavy product interfaces.

AngularReact

Cross-Framework Components

Ship the same visual language to React and Angular with mirrored primitives for actions, navigation, shells, and telemetry.

Glassmorphism Engine

Sky UI combines layered blur, luminous borders, and animated depth cues into a reusable surface system instead of isolated widgets.

Dashboard-Ready Telemetry

Use chart-ready widgets, navigation rails, and shell containers to assemble monitoring and control panels quickly.

Utility-Friendly Styling

The library fits naturally into Sass and Tailwind workflows so teams can extend or skin surfaces without fighting the stack.

Why Sky UI

Built for dense interfaces, not generic landing pages.

Sky UI focuses on the surfaces product teams actually need: clear call-to-action buttons, adaptable navigation, layered shells, and telemetry widgets that still feel premium under heavy information density.

Theming
Midnight and Daylight surfaces
Frameworks
React and Angular tracks
Styling
Sass-friendly and Tailwind-ready
Interaction
Motion-driven without losing clarity
